import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Pinch //XCUIElementTypeImage scale=1.974"):
        actions.pinch(actions.find_element(AppiumBy.XPATH, '//XCUIElementTypeImage'), scale=1.974, velocity=1.068)
    assert True
step_001_t5:
import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Rotate //XCUIElementTypeImage 115.3°"):
        actions.rotate(actions.find_element(AppiumBy.XPATH, '//XCUIElementTypeImage'), rotation=115.3)
    assert True
